prompt: Overhead flat lay product photography on clean white surface: a kraft paper pouch bag of Puptides dog treats in the center, surrounded by small round golden-brown soft chew treats (1 inch diameter, disc-shaped, slightly domed top, soft matte texture with tiny herb flecks). A small white ceramic bowl holds several of the round chews. A dog paw reaches toward one chew from the corner. Warm natural lighting, minimalist premium pet supplement aesthetic.
